name: Connected
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Augusta and Winslow, Maine with savings accounts, lending products, and digital banking services across Kennebec, Somerset, Lincoln, and Waldo counties.
description_long: Connected Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative operating in Augusta and Winslow, Maine. The institution is federally insured through the NCUA and serves residents across Kennebec, Somerset, Lincoln, and Waldo counties in central Maine. Like all credit unions, Connected operates on a cooperative model where members are part-owners rather than customers of a traditional bank. Connected offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including deposit accounts (savings, checking, money market, club accounts, and certificates), loan products (auto, recreational, student, personal, and mortgages), and digital banking services. They provide VISA credit cards with variable rates, home equity lines of credit, and specialized accounts such as Health Savings Accounts (HSA) and IRA retirement accounts. Members can access their accounts through online banking, mobile banking, mobile check deposit, and bill pay services. The credit union also offers shared branching and ATM access through their network. Connected distinguishes itself as a local financial institution with decision-making authority at the branch level, emphasizing fast loan approval processes and the ability to finance vehicles directly at dealerships. They promote accessibility features on their website and offer youth-focused products including a Youth Savings Program and scholarship opportunities. The institution actively markets limited-time promotional rates on products like home equity lines of credit and maintains an accessible mobile banking platform with mobile pay functionality. As a credit union, Connected serves its membership with member-owned governance and typically offers more favorable rates on deposits and loans compared to for-profit banks. However, membership requirements and geographic service limitations apply. Like most traditional credit unions, they may have fewer branch locations and ATMs than large national banks, though shared branching mitigates this limitation.
services: ATM and shared branch network access
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure with NCUA federal insurance protection
Local decision-making on loans with advertised fast approval processes
Can finance vehicles directly at dealerships without separate dealer financing
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, auto loans, credit cards, and investment products
Digital-first capabilities including mobile check deposit, mobile pay, and online bill pay
Specialized accounts like HSA and IRA options for retirement and healthcare savings
Youth programs including Youth Savings accounts and scholarship opportunities
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Augusta/Winslow, Maine and surrounding counties
Likely has fewer physical branch locations and ATMs compared to national banks (though mitigated by shared branching)
Membership eligibility requirements may apply (standard for credit unions)
Credit card variable rate of 11.99% is not presented as particularly competitive without comparison data
Website does not clearly disclose membership fees, minimum balance requirements, or full terms for deposit products
best_for: Maine residents in Kennebec, Somerset, Lincoln, and Waldo counties seeking local relationship banking
Borrowers who want to finance vehicles directly at dealerships without third-party lenders
Members prioritizing member-ownership governance and not-for-profit financial institution values
Families seeking youth savings programs and youth financial education opportunities
diagnosis: Connected Credit Union is best for central Maine residents who value member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions and want local relationship lending with fast decision-making. The main caveat is geographic limitation—membership and full service access are restricted to the Augusta/Winslow area and surrounding Maine counties, making this institution unsuitable for out-of-state applicants or those outside the service territory.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Connected — Credit Union in AUGUSTA, ME | CreditDoc
meta_description: Connected — NCUA-insured credit union in AUGUSTA, ME. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
